languages.text: "Наивность низших сознаний неизмерима, а доверчивость — безгранична. Или, быть может, память примитивного повредилась, и он не помнит, как алкал знаний, пытаясь вырвать их из моей бессмертной плоти? Как присвоил мой инструмент, не понимая его сути? Как погубил второго, о ценности которого ныне стенает, и как пробудил спящих, чтобы те властвовали над планетой безраздельно?"

"The naivety of lower consciousnesses is fathomless, and the gullibility boundless. Or perhaps the primitive's memory is damaged, and he does not remember how, hungering for knowledge, he sought to wrest it from my immortal flesh? How he stole my instrument without understanding its essence? How he destroyed the other, whose value he now bemoans, and awakened the sleeping ones so that they could rule the planet unchallenged?"
languages.original_text: "Наивность низших сознаний неизмерима, а доверчивость — безгранична. Или, быть может, память примитивного повредилась, и он не помнит, как алкал знаний, пытаясь вырвать их из моей бессмертной плоти? Как присвоил мой инструмент, не понимая его сути? Как погубил второго, о ценности которого ныне стенает, и как пробудил спящих, чтобы те властвовали над планетой безраздельно?"

languages.text: “低等意识的愚蠢让人难以想象，轻而易举便会相信他人。又或者是因为那原始生物的记忆已受损，忘记了自己是如何渴求知识，试图从我永恒的血肉中强取豪夺？如何偷走我的仪器却不理解其本质？如何毁掉了另一位智识，如今却为其价值哀叹？如何唤醒了沉睡者，让他们得以毫无阻碍地统治这颗行星？”
languages.original_text: "The naivety of lower consciousnesses is fathomless, and the gullibility boundless. Or perhaps the primitive's memory is damaged, and he does not remember how, hungering for knowledge, he sought to wrest it from my immortal flesh? How he stole my instrument without understanding its essence? How he destroyed the other, whose value he now bemoans, and awakened the sleeping ones so that they could rule the planet unchallenged?"

traits.locale_text: “低等意识的愚蠢让人难以想象，轻而易举便会相信他人。又或者是因为那原始生物的记忆已受损，忘记了自己是如何渴求知识，试图从我永恒的血肉中强取豪夺？如何偷走我的仪器却不理解其本质？如何毁掉了另一位智识，如今却为其价值哀叹？如何唤醒了沉睡者，让他们得以毫无阻碍地统治这颗行星？”

languages.text: «La ingenuidad de las consciencias más bajas es incomprensible, y su credulidad ilimitada. ¿O es que el primitivo ha sufrido daños en su memoria? Debería recordar cómo, en su búsqueda por conocimiento, intentó arrancárselo a mi cuerpo inmortal. O cómo robó mi instrumento sin comprender la esencia de este. Cómo destruyó al otro cuya pérdida ahora lamenta y despertó a los durmientes para que pudieran gobernar el planeta sin oposición».
languages.original_text: "The naivety of lower consciousnesses is fathomless, and the gullibility boundless. Or perhaps the primitive's memory is damaged, and he does not remember how, hungering for knowledge, he sought to wrest it from my immortal flesh? How he stole my instrument without understanding its essence? How he destroyed the other, whose value he now bemoans, and awakened the sleeping ones so that they could rule the planet unchallenged?"

Cómo destruyó al otro cuya pérdida ahora lamenta y despertó a los durmientes para que pudieran gobernar el planeta sin oposición».

languages.text: « La naïveté des consciences inférieures est insondable, et leur crédulité sans limites. À moins que la mémoire de l'être primitif ne soit endommagée et qu'il ait oublié la façon dont il a avidement cherché à arracher le savoir de ma chair immortelle ? La façon dont il a volé mon instrument sans en comprendre l'essence ? La façon dont il a détruit l'autre, dont il pleure aujourd'hui la valeur, et réveillé les âmes endormies pour leur permettre de régner sur la planète sans la moindre opposition ? »
languages.original_text: "The naivety of lower consciousnesses is fathomless, and the gullibility boundless. Or perhaps the primitive's memory is damaged, and he does not remember how, hungering for knowledge, he sought to wrest it from my immortal flesh? languages.text: "Daha düşük bilinçlerin saflığı derin, safdilliği ise sınırsız. Belki de ilkel olanın hafızası hasarlıdır... İrfana aç hâlde onu ölümsüz etimden nasıl söküp almaya çalıştığını, özünü anlamadan aletimi nasıl çaldığını, şimdi değerine ağıt yaktığı ötekini nasıl yok ettiğini ve uyuyanları gezegeni rakipsiz bir şekilde yönetsinler diye nasıl uyandırdığını hatırlamıyordur..."
languages.original_text: "The naivety of lower consciousnesses is fathomless, and the gullibility boundless. Or perhaps the primitive's memory is damaged, and he does not remember how, hungering for knowledge, he sought to wrest it from my immortal flesh? How he stole my instrument without understanding its essence? How he destroyed the other, whose value he now bemoans, and awakened the sleeping ones so that they could rule the planet unchallenged?"

languages.text: "Die Naivität niederer Bewusstseine ist unergründlich, ihre Gutgläubigkeit grenzenlos. Oder vielleicht ist die Erinnerung des Primitiven beschädigt und er weiß nicht mehr, wie er ihn in seiner Gier nach Wissen meinem unsterblichen Fleisch entreißen wollte? Wie er mein Werkzeug stahl, ohne seine Essenz zu verstehen? Wie er den anderen zerstörte, dessen Wert er nun beklagt, und die Schläfer weckte, auf dass sie unangefochten über den Planeten herrschen konnten?"
languages.original_text: "The naivety of lower consciousnesses is fathomless, and the gullibility boundless. Or perhaps the primitive's memory is damaged, and he does not remember how, hungering for knowledge, he sought to wrest it from my immortal flesh? How he stole my instrument without understanding its essence? How he destroyed the other, whose value he now bemoans, and awakened the sleeping ones so that they could rule the planet unchallenged?"

traits.locale_text: "Die Naivität niederer Bewusstseine ist unergründlich, ihre Gutgläubigkeit grenzenlos. Oder vielleicht ist die Erinnerung des Primitiven beschädigt und er weiß nicht mehr, wie er ihn in seiner Gier nach Wissen meinem unsterblichen Fleisch entreißen wollte? Wie er mein Werkzeug stahl, ohne seine Essenz zu verstehen? Wie er den anderen zerstörte, dessen Wert er nun beklagt, und die Schläfer weckte, auf dass sie unangefochten über den Planeten herrschen konnten?"

languages.text: 「下位の意識の無知は底知れず、その騙されやすさは無限大だ。あるいは、原始人の記憶が損なわれ、知識を求めて私の不滅の肉体から知識を奪おうとしたこと、私の道具をその本質を理解せずに盗んだこと、そして今嘆いている価値のあるものを破壊し、眠っていたものを目覚めさせ、地球を支配するよう促したことを覚えていないのかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "The naivety of lower consciousnesses is fathomless, and the gullibility boundless. Or perhaps the primitive's memory is damaged, and he does not remember how, hungering for knowledge, he sought to wrest it from my immortal flesh? How he stole my instrument without understanding its essence? How he destroyed the other, whose value he now bemoans, and awakened the sleeping ones so that they could rule the planet unchallenged?"

traits.locale_text: 「下位の意識の無知は底知れず、その騙されやすさは無限大だ。あるいは、原始人の記憶が損なわれ、知識を求めて私の不滅の肉体から知識を奪おうとしたこと、私の道具をその本質を理解せずに盗んだこと、そして今嘆いている価値のあるものを破壊し、眠っていたものを目覚めさせ、地球を支配するよう促したことを覚えていないのかもしれない」
